However, this is standard practice and not an inherent security flaw in the code. The code itself is not malicious; misuse depends on how the user employs it.\n\n---\n\n### Final assessment:\n- **Malware score:** 0 (correct)\n- **Obfuscated score:** 0 (correct)\n- **Risk score:** 0 (correct)\n\n### My own estimate:\nGiven the thorough analysis, I concur with the reports' assessments.
